name: 日陰の日葵 - sun in the shade
short_description: High school student Hiroyuki Nasukawa, whose father is a piano tuner, aspires to become a respectable adult. Yet he resorts to cheating on a test. Unsurprisingly, he gets caught. The punishment imposed on him was unexpectedly, “Please repair the school's piano.”
detailed_description:
Title: Sun in the Shade

Content: Visual Novel Game

・About the Translation Patch

A volunteer has kindly created an English translation patch.

Please refer to the Community Hub.

※This is because we cannot include external links on the store page.

※We do not provide support for the translation patch here.

・Synopsis

High school student Hiroyuki Nasukawa, whose father is a piano tuner, aspires to become a respectable adult. Yet, plagued by anxieties about his future, he leads a troubled school life. His troubles culminate when he resorts to cheating on an exam.

Unsurprisingly, he gets caught. The punishment imposed on him is unexpectedly: “Please repair the school's piano.”

・Game Overview

The scenario is a linear, non-branching path, completing in about 1-2 hours. There are no character voices. A key feature is that illustrations progress almost entirely through still images, without using character portraits. (See product images)

・Regarding Gameplay Videos

Feel free to create them.

Thank you.
